description: This video discusses how to assess risks in your investment portfolio, highlighting both internal and external factors that can impact asset performance.
topic_summary: Learn to evaluate risks associated with investments, including liquidity risk in cryptocurrencies and external influences like economic downturns [t=14:16]. The video suggests ranking investments by risk level and analyzing factors such as price and volatility [t=24:88].
aliases: How to Access Risks in Your Investment Portfolio
